function: AI product builder for rapid Carbon Actual, ABBA MAS, InstituteGPT, HAPI, and Web9 interface prototyping with GitHub-backed code handoff.
cost_note: SaaS builder route. Verify current plan, GitHub sync behavior, publishing limits, and production export rules before depending on it for core infrastructure.
activation_path: Use Lovable for fast interface creation and UX iteration. GitHub remains the source of truth. Production merges must pass ABBA review, SEAL approval, environment-variable separation, and Vercel build checks.

carbon_actual_position.role: Builder surface for external-facing apps and internal dashboards.
